description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof with blue-gray shingles and exposed wooden beams, giving it a rustic, medieval appearance. The structure includes a prominent stone chimney, a cylindrical turret-like extension with a conical roof, and a mix of timber framing and stonework on the walls. Windows are small and irregularly placed, with some featuring lattice designs, and the main entrance is set beneath a small overhanging roof. The house sits on a cobblestone base, suggesting it is part of an old-world urban or village setting. Architectural details such as the wooden supports, overhanging eaves, and the turret add character and complexity to the design. The overall look is reminiscent of a fantasy or historical European cottage.
description: A rustic, medieval-style house with a steep gable roof, timber framing, stone walls, and a turret, set on a cobblestone base. Features include a stone chimney, small lattice windows, and an overhanging entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, timber framing, stone chimney, and a prominent gable roof with visible windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical turret with a conical roof and the extended lower roof section.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the secondary entrance, more timber framing, and the stone chimney from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back door, a large expanse of shingled roof, and minimal window openings.
attribute_entryway_design: Small wooden door beneath an overhanging roof, with stone steps and timber framing, no porch or columns.
